Example_EN: She had previously worked as a hotel receptionist.
Example_CN: 她以前做过酒店前台。

Example_EN: Teachers take pride in their students' progress.
Example_CN: 老师为学生学习进步感到自豪。

Example_EN: The village priest helped organise the food bank.
Example_CN: 乡村神父帮助组织食物银行。

Example_EN: This painting is a prime example of her early work.
Example_CN: 这幅画是她早期作品的典型例子。

Example_EN: The story tells of a young prince and a dragon.
Example_CN: 故事讲述一位年轻王子与龙。

Example_EN: Children dressed as a fairy princess for the play.
Example_CN: 孩子们打扮成童话公主演话剧。

Example_EN: The school principal spoke at the morning assembly.
Example_CN: 校长在早会上发言。
MemoryTip: principal：主要的，或校长；勿与 principle 混淆。

Example_EN: Honesty is a basic principle in scientific research.
Example_CN: 诚实是科学研究的基本原则。
MemoryTip: principle：原则；勿与 principal 混淆。

Example_EN: Please print three copies of the meeting agenda.
Example_CN: 请打印三份会议议程。

Example_EN: The office printer has run out of paper again.
Example_CN: 办公室打印机又没纸了。

Example_EN: Please arrive ten minutes prior to the interview.
Example_CN: 请在面试前十分钟到达。

Example_EN: Public safety is the council's top priority.
Example_CN: 公共安全是市政会的头等大事。

Example_EN: The film tells the story of a political prisoner.
Example_CN: 电影讲述一位政治犯的故事。

Example_EN: Everyone has a right to privacy online.
Example_CN: 人人都有网络隐私权。

Example_EN: It is a great privilege to study at this university.
Example_CN: 能在这所大学学习是莫大荣幸。

Example_EN: There is a high probability of rain this evening.
Example_CN: 今晚下雨的概率很高。

Example_EN: A storm is the probable cause of the power cut.
Example_CN: 风暴很可能是停电原因。

Example_EN: Please follow the safety procedure in every experiment.
Example_CN: 每次实验请遵守安全程序。

Example_EN: We will proceed with the plan after the meeting.
Example_CN: 会后我们将继续推进该计划。

Example_EN: The application process takes about two weeks.
Example_CN: 申请流程大约需要两周。

Example_EN: Local farms produce fresh vegetables all year.
Example_CN: 本地农场全年生产新鲜蔬菜。
MemoryTip: produce：生产；名词也可指农产品。

Example_EN: She works as a film producer in London.
Example_CN: 她在伦敦当电影制片人。

Example_EN: The factory plans to increase production next year.
Example_CN: 工厂计划明年提高产量。

Example_EN: Teaching is a demanding but rewarding profession.
Example_CN: 教学是要求高但有回报的职业。

Example_EN: Seek professional advice before signing the contract.
Example_CN: 签合同前寻求专业意见。

Example_EN: Her favourite university professor taught ancient history.
Example_CN: 她最喜欢的大学教授讲授古代史。

Example_EN: Update your online profile with a clear photo.
Example_CN: 用清晰照片更新你的在线资料。

Example_EN: The shop hopes to make a profit this year.
Example_CN: 这家店希望今年能盈利。

Example_EN: She joined a summer training program for teachers.
Example_CN: 她参加了暑期教师培训项目。
MemoryTip: program 美式常见；英式常作 programme。

Example_EN: The school introduced progressive ideas about learning.
Example_CN: 学校引入了进步的学习理念。

Example_EN: School rules strictly prohibit phones in exams.
Example_CN: 校规严禁考试时使用手机。

Example_EN: The campaign aims to promote healthy eating.
Example_CN: 该活动旨在推广健康饮食。

Example_EN: She celebrated after getting a promotion at work.
Example_CN: 她工作晋升后庆祝了一番。

Example_EN: Thank you for your prompt reply to my email.
Example_CN: 谢谢你及时回复我的邮件。

Example_EN: Teachers stress clear pronunciation in oral exams.
Example_CN: 老师在口试中强调清晰发音。

Example_EN: Please bring proof of identity to the exam.
Example_CN: 请带身份证明参加考试。

Example_EN: Wash your hands in the proper way before cooking.
Example_CN: 做饭前用正确方法洗手。

Example_EN: Check that the heater is working properly.
Example_CN: 检查暖气是否正常运转。

Example_EN: Please respect private property near the beach.
Example_CN: 请尊重海滩附近的私有财产。

Example_EN: A large proportion of students walk to school.
Example_CN: 很大比例的学生步行上学。

Example_EN: The committee accepted her proposal for a new club.
Example_CN: 委员会接受了她成立新社团的提议。

Example_EN: I propose that we meet again next Tuesday.
Example_CN: 我提议我们下周二再见面。

Example_EN: Young graduates worry about job prospects today.
Example_CN: 年轻毕业生如今担心就业前景。

Example_EN: Laws protect children from dangerous work.
Example_CN: 法律保护儿童免受危险工作伤害。

Example_EN: Wear a helmet for protection from head injuries.
Example_CN: 戴头盔以防头部受伤。

Collocation: high in protein;protein shake;source of protein
Example_EN: Beans are a healthy source of protein.
Example_CN: 豆子是健康的蛋白质来源。

Example_EN: Students held a peaceful protest against higher fees.
Example_CN: 学生举行和平抗议反对提高学费。

Example_EN: Can you prove that your method always works?
Example_CN: 你能证明你的方法总是有效吗？

Example_EN: Hotels provide guests with free breakfast here.
Example_CN: 这里的酒店为客人提供免费早餐。

Example_EN: Change your internet provider if the speed is poor.
Example_CN: 如果网速差就更换网络服务商。

Collocation: remote province;province of;live in a province
Example_EN: She comes from a remote province in the north.
Example_CN: 她来自北方一个偏远省份。

Example_EN: The contract includes a clear provision for refunds.
Example_CN: 合同包含明确的退款条款。

Example_EN: Victims often need psychological support after accidents.
Example_CN: 事故后受害者常需要心理支持。

Collocation: clinical psychologist;child psychologist;work as a psychologist
Example_EN: A clinical psychologist spoke to the school staff.
Example_CN: 一位临床心理学家与学校员工交谈。

Example_EN: She hopes to study psychology at university.
Example_CN: 她希望在大学学习心理学。

Collocation: local pub;pub lunch;go to the pub
Example_EN: They met friends at the local pub after work.
Example_CN: 下班后他们在本地酒吧见朋友。

Example_EN: Her research is awaiting publication next spring.
Example_CN: 她的研究等待明年春天发表。

Example_EN: The café got free publicity from a TV visit.
Example_CN: 咖啡馆因电视到访获得免费宣传。

Example_EN: She hopes to publish a book within two years.
Example_CN: 她希望两年内出版一本书。

Example_EN: Please fill the tank at the next petrol pump.
Example_CN: 请到下一个加油泵把油箱加满。

Example_EN: Use this tool to punch a hole in the ticket.
Example_CN: 用这个工具在票上打孔。

Example_EN: Please keep the receipt after every purchase.
Example_CN: 每次购买后请保留收据。

Example_EN: This bottle contains pure spring water.
Example_CN: 这瓶装的是纯净泉水。

Collocation: pursue a career;pursue a goal;pursue someone
Example_EN: She decided to pursue a career in nursing.
Example_CN: 她决定从事护理职业。

Example_EN: He moved abroad in pursuit of better opportunities.
Example_CN: 他为追求更好机会移居国外。

Example_EN: She needs one more qualification to become a teacher.
Example_CN: 她还需要一个资质才能当老师。

Example_EN: Does this diploma qualify you to teach abroad?
Example_CN: 这个文凭使你有资格在国外教书吗？

Example_EN: Fresh food improves the quality of family meals.
Example_CN: 新鲜食物提升家庭用餐质量。

Example_EN: Buy rice in large quantity to save money.
Example_CN: 大量购买大米可以省钱。

Collocation: fill in a questionnaire;customer questionnaire;online questionnaire
Example_EN: Please fill in this short customer questionnaire.
Example_CN: 请填写这份简短客户问卷。

Example_EN: We joined a long queue outside the ticket office.
Example_CN: 我们加入售票处外的长队。

Example_EN: Please speak quietly so others can concentrate.
Example_CN: 请小声说话，好让别人专心。

Example_EN: He decided to quit smoking before the baby arrives.
Example_CN: 他决定在宝宝出生前戒烟。

Example_EN: Can you quote a price for repairing the roof?
Example_CN: 你能为修屋顶报个价吗？

Example_EN: Schools teach students about racial equality.
Example_CN: 学校向学生讲授种族平等。

Example_EN: Horse racing is popular in this country.
Example_CN: 赛马在这个国家很流行。

Example_EN: Planes appear as dots on the radar screen.
Example_CN: 飞机在雷达屏幕上显示为小点。

Example_EN: Wear cream to protect skin from solar radiation.
Example_CN: 涂防晒霜保护皮肤免受太阳辐射。

Example_EN: The new plan calls for radical change in education.
Example_CN: 新计划要求对教育做彻底变革。

Example_EN: Many people prefer rail travel to flying.
Example_CN: 许多人更喜欢坐火车出行而非飞行。

Collocation: wear a raincoat;pack a raincoat;yellow raincoat
Example_EN: Pack a raincoat if the weather looks uncertain.
Example_CN: 如果天气不确定请带上雨衣。

Example_EN: Heavy rainfall caused flooding in the valley.
Example_CN: 强降雨导致山谷洪水。

Example_EN: The shop offers a wide range of fresh fruit.
Example_CN: 这家店提供种类丰富的新鲜水果。

Example_EN: She holds a high rank in the police force.
Example_CN: 她在警队中级别很高。

Example_EN: The city has seen rapid growth in tourism.
Example_CN: 这座城市旅游业快速增长。

Example_EN: Technology is changing rapidly every year.
Example_CN: 技术每年都在快速变化。

Example_EN: Seeing a wild otter here is quite rare.
Example_CN: 在这里看见野生水獭相当罕见。

Example_EN: We rarely see snow in this part of the country.
Example_CN: 这个地区很少下雪。

Example_EN: A brown rat ran across the empty street.
Example_CN: 一只棕色老鼠跑过空荡荡的街道。

Example_EN: The interest rate on the loan rose last month.
Example_CN: 贷款利率上个月上涨了。

Example_EN: Do not eat raw fish if you feel unwell.
Example_CN: 身体不适时不要吃生鱼。

Example_EN: How did the crowd react to the sudden news?
Example_CN: 人群对突发消息作何反应？

Example_EN: She had a strong allergic reaction to the medicine.
Example_CN: 她对这种药有强烈过敏反应。

Example_EN: Fresh water is not readily available in every village.
Example_CN: 并非每个村子都能轻易获得淡水。

Example_EN: Set a realistic goal for your first exam.
Example_CN: 为第一次考试设定现实目标。

Example_EN: In reality, learning takes patience and daily work.
Example_CN: 实际上，学习需要耐心和每日努力。

Example_EN: Twenty pounds is a reasonable price for this book.
Example_CN: 这本书二十英镑价格合理。

Example_EN: The hotel was clean and reasonably priced.
Example_CN: 这家酒店干净且价格合理。

Collocation: recall a name;product recall;hard to recall
Example_EN: I cannot recall the name of that quiet street.
Example_CN: 我想不起那条安静街道的名字。

Collocation: keep the receipt;sales receipt;ask for a receipt
Example_EN: Always keep the receipt when you buy electronics.
Example_CN: 买电子产品时一定保留收据。
